description: Enroll devices in Microsoft Intune to keep data secure and allow users to access company data on their devices. Intune includes services and tools you can use to manage and monitor Windows 10 or later devices in Microsoft 365 Lighthouse.
userImpact: This group of tasks enables device management through Microsoft Intune and Microsoft Entra. Devices will automatically enroll in Intune when a work or school account is configured. Device health and compliance metrics will be sent to Microsoft Intune and Microsoft 365 Lighthouse.

managementTemplateSteps.displayName: Configure Microsoft Entra for joining devices
managementTemplateSteps.description: This task will configure the device registration policy in Microsoft Entra. Device registration with Microsoft Entra enables automatic device enrollment into Intune.
managementTemplateSteps.userImpact: This group of tasks enables device management through Microsoft Intune and Microsoft Entra. Devices will automatically enroll in Intune when a work or school account is configured. Device health and compliance metrics will be sent to Microsoft Intune and Microsoft 365 Lighthouse.

informationLinks.displayName: Enroll Windows 10 or later devices in Microsoft Intune

versions.name: Automatic_DeviceEnrollmentMEM

managementTemplateSteps.description: This task will configure Microsoft Entra to use Microsoft Intune for device management.
managementTemplateSteps.userImpact: This group of tasks enables device management through Microsoft Intune and Microsoft Entra. Devices will automatically enroll in Intune when a work or school account is configured. Device health and compliance metrics will be sent to Microsoft Intune and Microsoft 365 Lighthouse.

informationLinks.displayName: Enroll Windows 10 or later devices in Microsoft Intune

versions.name: DeviceEnrollmentMEM

values:
{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} PATCH /beta/policies/mobileDeviceManagementPolicies/0000000a-0000-0000-c000-000000000000 \ {
            "complianceUrl": "https://portal.manage.microsoft.com/?portalAction=Compliance",
            "description": "Device Management Policy for Microsoft Intune (edited by M365Lighthouse)",
            "discoveryUrl": "https://enrollment.manage.microsoft.com/enrollmentserver/discovery.svc",
            "displayName": "Microsoft Intune",
            "isValid": true,
            "termsOfUseUrl": "https://portal.manage.microsoft.com/TermsofUse.aspx"
        }

{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} PATCH /beta/policies/mobileAppManagementPolicies/0000000a-0000-0000-c000-000000000000 \ {
            "complianceUrl": "https://portal.manage.microsoft.com/?portalAction=Compliance",
            "description": "Device Management Policy for Microsoft Intune (edited by M365Lighthouse)",
            "discoveryUrl": "https://enrollment.manage.microsoft.com/enrollmentserver/discovery.svc",
            "displayName": "Microsoft Intune",
            "isValid": true,
            "termsOfUseUrl": "https://portal.manage.microsoft.com/TermsofUse.aspx"
        }

lambdaDefinitions.value:
select CASE
                        when val is null then ''
                        else val
                        end
                        from (select json_extract(data,'$.appliesTo') as val from arg0)

select CASE
                        when val is null then ''
                        else val
                        end
                        from (select json_extract(data,'$.termsOfUseUrl') as val from arg0)

select CASE
                        when val is null then ''
                        else val
                        end
                        from (select json_extract(data,'$.discoveryUrl') as val from arg0)

select CASE
                        when val is null then ''
                        else val
                        end
                        from (select json_extract(data,'$.complianceUrl') as val from arg0)

managementTemplateSteps.description: This task enables Intune Endpoint Analytics, which proactively monitors the health of your tenant's enrolled devices. Endpoint Analytics collects device event information from supported Windows 10 or later devices and provides recommendations to improve device performance and application responsiveness. You can view Endpoint Analytics data in both Microsoft Intune and Microsoft 365 Lighthouse.
managementTemplateSteps.userImpact: This group of tasks enables device management through Microsoft Intune and Microsoft Entra. Devices will automatically enroll in Intune when a work or school account is configured. Device health and compliance metrics will be sent to Microsoft Intune and Microsoft 365 Lighthouse.

informationLinks.displayName: Enroll Windows 10 or later devices in Microsoft Intune

versions.name: DeviceHealth
versions.contentMarkdown: When enabling this policy your tenants' devices won't be affected but Endpoint Analytics will be working in the background to provide recommendations and improve performance on your tenants' Windows Devices.

managementTemplateSteps.description: Deployment of this task creates a Microsoft Intune Proactive Remediation that forwards Windows event logs to Microsoft 365 Lighthouse. You can view and analyze events to troubleshoot device issues. To retain device connectivity to Microsoft 365 Lighthouse, this task must be redeployed annually.
managementTemplateSteps.userImpact: This group of tasks enables device management through Microsoft Intune and Microsoft Entra. Devices will automatically enroll in Intune when a work or school account is configured. Device health and compliance metrics will be sent to Microsoft Intune and Microsoft 365 Lighthouse.

informationLinks.displayName: Enroll Windows 10 or later devices in Microsoft Intune

versions.name: Deploy script

settings.name: maxUploadSize
settings.displayName: Maximum size (in KB) to upload per collection

values: @sys.write([{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} GET graph.microsoft.com/beta/deviceManagement/managedDevices?$filter=(((deviceType eq 'desktop') or (deviceType eq 'windowsRT') or (deviceType eq 'winEmbedded') or (deviceType eq 'surfaceHub')))&$select=deviceName,lastSyncDateTime,id,complianceState],"deviceList")

versions.processedDeploymentAction: @sys.write([@sys.project([{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} GET graph.microsoft.com/beta/deviceManagement/deviceManagementScripts?$filter=displayName%20eq%20'M365%20Lighthouse%20-%20Windows%20Log'&$select=id],"id")],"deploymentId") EOC {IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} DELETE graph.microsoft.com/beta/deviceManagement/deviceManagementScripts/[@sys.read("deploymentId")] EOC @sys.DEPLOYWINDOWSLOGSCRIPT([@sys.trimArray()],[@sys.trimArray()],[@sys.trimArray()],[@sys.trimArray()]) EOC @sys.append([/result]) EOC
